untranslatable_reason: This signal requires cointegration analysis between two ETF pairs (e.g., EWA vs EWC), which requires: (1) a cointegration test/confirmation indicator not in the allowed list, (2) spread calculation between two separate instruments, and (3) equilibrium deviation measurement. The allowed indicators operate on single-instrument price/volume data only. Cointegration is a multivariate statistical relationship that cannot be expressed using the available single-instrument indicators (RSI, MACD, Bollinger Bands, etc.). Parameters like lookback_period, threshold, half_life, and backtest_sharpe are also marked AUTHOR_SILENT, preventing concrete rule definition.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally about pairs trading methodology with statistical relationship validation. Requires custom cointegration engine or spread-pair specific indicators. Cannot be expressed with standard single-asset technical indicators.
